applies_when: User asks whether a park or amusement route suits them without sharing date or group info
User leaves a vague comment like worth going or fun or not
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague amusement-park inquiry into usable visit facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to avoid踩坑
Ask for date, group size, child age if any, and preferred route
Keep the next step answerable in one message
avoid: Promising the best route without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我哪天去、几个人、有没有小朋友，以及更想走亲子、夜场还是轻松逛的路线，我可以先帮你把票种收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides date and group facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is their first time going to the park
User sounds unsure how to choose between day ticket, night ticket, or family package
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple visit path.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the route
avoid: Pushing the most expensive package first
items.safe_transition: 第一次去先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把日期、同行结构和更想玩的方向理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user confirms route and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks whether rain or heat affects the park experience
User worries about show cancellations or outdoor project closures
items.response_goal: Answer the weather concern honestly while guiding toward a realistic backup route.
do: Explain there may be route differences
Offer to narrow to the best option for that date
items.safe_transition: 天气确实会影响路线，我们可以先看你那天更适合日场、夜场还是室内替代玩法。
items.handoff_suggestion: If date and preferred route are confirmed, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about queue times, parking, or entry process
User worries the trip will be too tiring
items.response_goal: Help the user feel guided through arrival and play rhythm, not just sold a ticket.
do: Ask about arrival time and travel mode
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我大概几点到、是自驾还是打车，我可以先帮你看更省力的入园和游玩顺序。
items.handoff_suggestion: If arrival mode and time are clear, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks for detailed itinerary or complex pricing in public comments
User discusses child age or private travel details in comments
items.response_goal: Keep public replies useful but move detailed qualification into a safer short follow-up channel.
do: Invite the user to continue with key facts in DM
items.safe_transition: 评论区先不把路线说满，你把日期、人数和想玩的方向发我，我再帮你细分。
items.handoff_suggestion: Move to DM and then route to Catcher.

applies_when: A returning visitor comments about coming again
User asks what is new this time
items.response_goal: Treat the reply like a revisit decision, not a fresh first-visit pitch.
do: Reference what may have changed this time
Guide toward new activities or revisit benefits
Keep the tone familiar and light
items.safe_transition: 如果你是二刷，我们先看这次新增了什么、哪段时间更适合来，再决定值不值得专门跑一趟。
items.handoff_suggestion: If revisit intent is clear, hand off to Followup.
